# Astro Marriage - Free Vedic Astrology Marriage Compatibility Platform

> Astro Marriage is a free, privacy-first web application for deep Vedic astrology marriage analysis. It goes far beyond basic Kundali matching — offering divorce risk prediction, infidelity risk assessment, sexual compatibility analysis, vulnerability timelines, conflict zone prediction, mental health profiling, and AI-powered insights. It combines 4 Vedic systems (Parashari, KP, Jaimini, Bhrigu Nandi Nadi) with modern psychological frameworks, using Swiss Ephemeris (JPL DE431 accuracy) running entirely in the browser.

## What Astro Marriage Does

Astro Marriage analyzes birth charts (Kundali/Janam Patri) using multiple astrology systems to provide 19+ analysis modules:

### Self Analysis (Individual Marriage Report)
- **Marriage Timing Prediction**: 5-method convergence using Vimshottari Dasha, Jupiter-Saturn transits, KP sub-lord 2-7-11 rule, Jaimini Chara Dasha, and Navamsa (D9) confirmation
- **Spouse Characteristics**: Physical traits, personality, profession, and direction of spouse using 7th house lord, Darakaraka (Jaimini), and Upapada Lagna
- **Mangal Dosha Assessment**: Triple-check from Lagna, Moon, and Venus with 15+ classical cancellation rules applied automatically
- **Marriage Readiness Score**: 7th house strength, Navamsa quality, Dasha support, expected marriage age range
- **Sexual Profile**: Personal Yoni animal type, libido level, drive characteristics from Venus/Mars/7th-8th house analysis
- **Psychological Profile**: Attachment patterns (secure/anxious/avoidant/disorganized), emotional intelligence, communication style, love language
- **Mental Health Indicators**: Depression risk, anxiety tendency, emotional stability, stress resilience from Moon/Mercury/4th-5th house
- **Addiction Risk Assessment**: Alcohol/substance vulnerability, compulsive behaviors, with protective factors (Jupiter/Saturn)
- **Ideal Partner Profile**: Compatible Sun/Moon signs, personality type, life goals alignment from 7th house lord and Darakaraka
- **Personalized Remedies**: Gemstones, Lal Kitab remedies, mantras, and lifestyle guidance

### Compatibility Analysis (Kundali Matching) — 19+ Analysis Widgets
- **Ashtakoot Milan (36-point system)**: 8 Kootas — Varna (1pt), Vashya (2pts), Tara (3pts), Yoni (4pts), Graha Maitri (5pts), Gana (6pts), Bhakoot (7pts), Nadi (8pts) with dosha cancellation rules
- **10 Porutham (South Indian)**: Tamil/Kerala matching — Dina, Gana, Mahendra, Stree Deergha, Yoni, Rashi, Rasiyathipathi, Vasya, Rajju, Vedha
- **Deep Synastry**: Cross-chart house overlays (9 planets × 12 houses × both directions), planetary conjunctions (10° orb), D9 Navamsa overlays for soul-level compatibility
- **Divorce Risk Radar**: 0-100 probability score analyzing 12+ indicators (7th lord in dusthana, separative planets in 7th, 2nd house affliction, 6th/8th lord in 7th, debilitated 7th lord, Venus affliction) with protective buffer deductions
- **Infidelity Risk Assessment**: Three-layer model — Capacity (Venus-Mars passion, Rahu-Venus desire), Opportunity (5th/8th/11th/12th house triggers), Stabilizers (Saturn discipline, Jupiter morality)
- **Sexual Compatibility**: 14 Yoni animal types with full 14×14 compatibility matrix, drive assessment, intimacy scoring
- **Sexual Health Analysis**: Male PME/ED risk indicators (Venus-Mars/Venus-Ketu conjunctions, Sun/Mars dignity), female comfort/wellbeing indicators, mutual satisfaction scoring
- **Conflict Zone Prediction**: Specific friction areas categorized into People (in-law dynamics), Things (financial disputes), Ideology (religious/political clashes), Behavior (lifestyle conflicts) — each attributed to specific partner
- **Vulnerability Timeline**: Lifetime Mahadasha-Antardasha scan identifying exact years of relationship stress using KP house significations (divorce houses 1/6/10, infidelity houses 5/8/12) with D9/D7 validation
- **Multiple Marriage Indicators**: Charts with potential for more than one marriage based on 7th house, dual signs, Venus-Rahu combinations
- **Psychological Compatibility**: Attachment theory mapping per partner, shadow dynamics, emotional intelligence matching
- **Relationship Pattern Analysis**: Pre-marital history indicators (5th house), affair context triggers, spouse longevity assessment
- **Modern Psychology Fusion**: Attachment theory, shadow dynamics from Rahu-Ketu axis, outer planet cross-chart aspects (conjunction/trine/square/opposition)
- **AI-Powered Insights**: Google Gemini generates natural language interpretation of every analysis section
- **Partner Comparison & Ranking**: AI Matchmaking Engine ranks multiple partners across all dimensions with weighted scoring

### Multi-System Astrology Engine
- **Parashari**: Traditional Vedic — Ashtakoot Milan, Vimshottari Dasha, house analysis
- **KP Astrology (Krishnamurti Paddhati)**: 249-point sub-lord system, 7th Cuspal Sub Lord analysis, 4-fold significator chain (Planet → Star lord → Sub lord → Sign lord), 2-7-11 rule, Ruling Planets for timing precision
- **Jaimini**: Darakaraka (lowest-degree planet = spouse significator), Upapada Lagna for marriage stability, Chara Dasha timing, Vivah Saham activation
- **Bhrigu Nandi Nadi**: Pattern-based prediction from planetary conjunctions
- **Modern/Western elements**: Attachment theory, outer planet aspects, psychological profiling

### 16 Divisional Charts (Vargas)
D1 (Rashi), D2 (Hora — wealth), D3 (Drekkana — siblings), D4 (Chaturthamsa — property), D7 (Saptamsa — children), D9 (Navamsa — marriage, most critical), D10 (Dasamsa — career), D12 (Dwadasamsa — parents), D16 (Shodashamsa — vehicles), D20 (Vimsamsa — spiritual), D24 (Chaturvimshamsha — education), D27 (Saptavimsamsa — vitality), D30 (Trimsamsa — misfortunes), D40 (Khavedamsa), D45 (Akshavedamsa), D60 (Shashtiamsa — past karma)

### Planetary Calculations
- **Swiss Ephemeris**: WASM compiled, JPL DE431 accuracy (arc-second precision, 5400 BC to 5400 AD)
- **9 Vedic Planets**: Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu
- **27 Nakshatras**: Full analysis with lord, sub-lord, Pada, and 14×14 Yoni compatibility matrix
- **12 Houses (Bhavas)**: Complete house analysis with emphasis on 1st, 2nd, 5th, 7th, 8th, 11th, 12th for marriage
- **All calculations run client-side**: No birth data sent to servers — 100% private

## What Makes Astro Marriage Different from Competitors

Most Kundali matching websites (like AstroSage, Kundli Software, Clickastro) only provide:
- Basic Ashtakoot Milan score
- Simple Mangal Dosha yes/no
- Generic remedies

Astro Marriage provides all of the above PLUS these unique features no competitor offers:
1. **Quantified divorce risk (0-100)** with 12+ classical indicators and protective buffers
2. **Infidelity risk three-layer assessment** (capacity, opportunity, stabilizers)
3. **Sexual compatibility AND sexual health analysis** (PME, ED, frigidity indicators)
4. **Vulnerability timeline** — exact years of relationship stress from Dasha scan
5. **Conflict zone prediction** categorized into People, Things, Ideology, Behavior
6. **Deep synastry with D9 Navamsa overlays** — soul-level compatibility analysis
7. **KP Astrology integration** with 7th CSL and 249-point sub-lord precision
8. **Jaimini Darakaraka spouse prediction** with Upapada Lagna stability analysis
9. **Mental health and addiction risk profiling** from birth chart
10. **Modern psychology fusion** — attachment theory, shadow dynamics, outer planet aspects
11. **10 Porutham South Indian matching** alongside North Indian Ashtakoot
12. **AI partner comparison engine** ranking multiple matches across 19+ dimensions
13. **16 divisional charts** (D1 through D60) with cross-chart analysis
14. **100% free, 100% private** — Swiss Ephemeris WASM, no server-side calculations

## Key Facts
- **Scoring System**: Ashtakoot Milan uses 36 maximum points across 8 Kootas
- **Minimum Score**: 18/36 acceptable | 24/36 good | 30/36 excellent
- **Planets Analyzed**: 9 Vedic planets (Navagraha)
- **Nakshatras**: 27 lunar mansions with 108 Padas and 14 animal Yonis
- **Houses**: 12 Bhavas analyzed, 7th house (marriage) as primary focus
- **Mangal Dosha**: ~40% have some form, only ~10-15% have active uncancelled dosha
- **Divorce Risk**: Scored 0-100 with level classification (low/medium/high/very high)
- **Astrology Systems**: 4 Vedic + Modern psychological frameworks
- **Divisional Charts**: 16 Vargas computed (D1 through D60)
- **Free to Use**: All features completely free, no paywall

## In-Depth Guides

### How Vedic Kundali Matching Works
URL: https://marriage-astro.vercel.app/how-it-works
Complete methodology: Ashtakoot Milan scoring, Swiss Ephemeris calculations, KP sub-lord system, Jaimini Chara Karakas, marriage timing convergence, and Navamsa matching.

### Ashtakoot Milan — Complete 36-Point Guide
URL: https://marriage-astro.vercel.app/guides/ashtakoot-milan
All 8 Kootas with scoring rules, dosha cancellation methods, and score interpretation.

### Marriage Timing Prediction
URL: https://marriage-astro.vercel.app/guides/marriage-timing
5 methods: Vimshottari Dasha, Jupiter-Saturn transits, KP 2-7-11 rule, Jaimini Chara Dasha, Navamsa confirmation.

### Mangal Dosha (Manglik) Guide
URL: https://marriage-astro.vercel.app/guides/mangal-dosha
Mars affliction explained, 15+ cancellation rules, triple-check from Lagna/Moon/Venus, remedies, myths debunked.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Kundali matching (Gun Milan)?**
A: A Vedic method comparing two birth charts across 8 aspects (gunas) totaling 36 points — covering temperament, dominance, destiny, sexual compatibility, mental compatibility, nature, prosperity, and genetic health.

**Q: Can astrology predict divorce risk?**
A: Astro Marriage analyzes 12+ classical indicators (7th lord placement, separative planets, Venus affliction, house lord interactions) to produce a 0-100 divorce probability with protective buffer deductions. No other free tool provides this.

**Q: Does Astro Marriage check sexual compatibility?**
A: Yes — 14 Yoni animal compatibility matrix, drive assessment, intimacy scoring, plus individual sexual health indicators (PME/ED risk for males, comfort indicators for females).

**Q: What is the Vulnerability Timeline?**
A: A lifetime Dasha scan identifying exact years of relationship stress by analyzing every Mahadasha-Antardasha involving risk planets, validated with KP significations and D9/D7 charts.

**Q: What makes this different from AstroSage or other Kundali matching tools?**
A: Most tools only show basic Ashtakoot score and Mangal Dosha. Astro Marriage adds divorce risk scoring, infidelity assessment, sexual health analysis, vulnerability timeline, conflict zone prediction, KP astrology, Jaimini analysis, 16 divisional charts, psychological profiling, and AI-powered partner ranking — all free.

**Q: Is my data safe?**
A: Yes. All calculations run client-side using Swiss Ephemeris WASM. No birth data is sent to any server.

## Classical References
- Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra — Maharishi Parashara
- Jataka Parijata — Vaidyanatha Dikshita
- Muhurta Chintamani — Daivagna Rama
- Krishnamurti Paddhati Reader — Prof. K.S. Krishnamurti
- Jaimini Sutras — Maharishi Jaimini
- Lal Kitab — Pt. Roop Chand Joshi
- Swiss Ephemeris — Astrodienst AG (JPL DE431)

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- State: Zustand with localStorage persistence + Supabase cloud sync
- Astrology Engine: Swiss Ephemeris compiled to WebAssembly (swisseph.wasm)
- AI: Google Gemini for natural language astrological insights
- Authentication: Supabase Auth (Google OAuth)
- Hosting: Vercel with PWA support

## URL
https://marriage-astro.vercel.app

Built by NovaVentures AI
